name: Affirm Holdings, Inc.
summary: Affirm Holdings, Inc., founded in 2012, operates a next-generation payment network offering buy-now-pay-later and installment loan products. Its platform provides three core loan products: Pay-in-X (short-term 0% APR plans), 0% APR monthly installment loans, and interest-bearing monthly installment loans. Affirm also offers the Affirm Card (debit card) and virtual cards. As of June 30, 2025, it served approximately 377 thousand active merchants and facilitated $36.7 billion in GMV.

products.name: Pay-in-X
products.description: Short-term payment plans with one to four 0% APR installments for consumers at checkout.

products.name: 0% APR Monthly Installment Loans
products.description: Zero-interest monthly installment loans facilitated through merchant partnerships.

products.name: Interest-Bearing Monthly Installment Loans
products.description: Simple-interest installment loans with rates based on transaction risk, creditworthiness, and loan terms.

products.name: Affirm Card
products.description: Debit card allowing consumers to pay in full or apply to pay over time via the Affirm App.

products.name: Virtual Card
products.description: One-time-use virtual cards enabling consumers to shop with merchants not integrated with Affirm.

products.name: Affirm App
products.description: Consumer-facing app enabling card management, purchase financing, and merchant discovery.

partnerships.description: Banks that originate loans facilitated through Affirm's platform.
Banks that issue the Affirm Card and virtual cards on behalf of Affirm.
